name: Tabasco Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the juice from a regular quart of pickles.
2. Add sugar and Tabasco Sauce to the drained pickles.
3. Let the mixture set for 5 days.
4. Shake or invert the jar at least twice a day to ensure an even coating.
5. This makes a very tasty pickle. Adjust the amount of Tabasco sauce to suit your taste preferences.
